goal: Train fastest on this repo's Chinese Markdown, task cards, governance notes, and Chinese code comments.

caseMix.why: Highest human-facing value; contains task IDs, status words, validation notes, and mixed inline code.
Covers ATM policy language and repo-specific Traditional Chinese terms.
Protects syntax, string literals, template strings, and nearby Chinese diagnostics.
Covers structured artifacts where keys and punctuation must survive.
Covers the exact documents most likely to be generated, corrupted, and reread by agents.

fastFeedbackMetrics.definition: Percent of protected tokens preserved exactly.
Percent of expected repo vocabulary recovered.
Reduction of U+FFFD count without inventing task IDs or paths.
Human or rule-based label: exact, readable, partial, unsafe.
Markdown/code/JSON structure still looks parseable after repair.

promotionRules: Promote a replacement to high-confidence only after it appears in at least 3 contexts or 2 source types.
Do not promote replacements that change identifiers, task IDs, file paths, command flags, JSON keys, or code spans.
Allow readableExpected recovery for cp1252-lossy and cp1252-double; require exactExpected for latin1-reversible.
When unsure, record the fragment as unrecoverable rather than guessing.
